instruction: A button or link, possibly represented by a heart icon, located in the bottom-left corner of the application interface. The text label may be "Your Library". If a heart icon is present, it's likely small (16-24px). The button/link is part of a bottom navigation bar or sidebar. Look for other navigation elements nearby such as "Home", "Search", or "Profile." The color may vary depending on the application's theme, but it could be a muted color or the app's primary color if currently selected.

element.label: The 'Liked Songs' button, which is located in the left sidebar, below the '+' button. It has a heart icon.
